channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Conor McGregor must pay woman $250K in sexual assault case, civil jury rules
item.description: LONDON (AP) — A woman who claimed mixed martial arts fighter Conor McGregor “brutally raped and battered” her in a Dublin hotel penthouse was awarded nearly 250,000 Euros ($257,000) on Friday by a civil court jury in Ireland. The woman said the Dec.
item.dc:creator: BRIAN MELLEY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Local fighter wins WBC Muy Thai world title
item.description: Selina Flores, 26, recently won the WBC Muy Thai world title, making history as the third American woman to ever do so.
item.dc:creator: Frank Jefferson, Fox 5

item.title: Martin Slumbers hangs his hat on making British Open big and promoting women's golf
item.description: Martin Slumbers could not have witnessed greater theater than his first British Open in charge of the R&A, the record-setting duel between Henrik Stenson and Phil Mickelson at Royal Troon. His only concern in 2016 was the audience.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: F1 closer to approving expanded grid for General Motors entry initially started by Michael Andretti
item.description: With a restructuring at Andretti Global that pushed Michael Andretti into a smaller role, the chances of his organization landing a Formula 1 team have substantially increased.
item.dc:creator: Jenna Fryer, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Top football recruit Bryce Underwood changes commitment to Michigan instead of LSU, AP source says
item.description: ANN ARBOR, Mich. (AP) — Bryce Underwood, the top-rated football recruit in the country, flipped to Michigan after pledging to play at LSU, a person familiar with the decision said Thursday night.
item.dc:creator: LARRY LAGE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: No. 1 college football recruit flips commitment from LSU to Michigan in shocking move
item.description: Bryce Underwood was convinced to stay in his home state, and the No. 1 overall high school football prospect is reportedly flipping his commitment from LSU to Michigan.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Aaron Judge, Shohei Ohtani named unanimous MVPs after historic seasons
item.description: The New York Yankees' Aaron Judge and Los Angeles Dodgers' Shohei Ohtani, the two biggest superstars in Major League Baseball, earned MVP Awards Thursday night.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Ohtani wins unanimous MVP after historic first season with Dodgers
item.description: Los Angeles Dodgers' superstar Shohei Ohtani is the 2024 National League Most Valuable Player. It was a unanimous decision to award the Japanese phenom the 2024 MVP, and in doing so, create another historic moment as he becomes the first full-time designated hitter to win it.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, KTLA 5

item.title: Penn State wins trademark case over retailer's use of vintage logos, images
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — Penn State has won a closely watched trademark fight over an online retailer's use of its vintage sports logos and images. A Pennsylvania jury awarded Penn State $28,000 in damages on Wednesday over products made and sold by Vintage Brand and Sportswear Inc.
item.dc:creator: MARYCLAIRE DALE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Alex Ovechkin is expected to miss 4 to 6 weeks with a broken left leg
item.description: Alex Ovechkin has a broken left fibula and is expected to be out four to six weeks, an injury that pauses the Washington Capitals superstar captain’s pursuit of Wayne Gretzky’s NHL career goals record.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bountiful beats Roy to win 5A state title, 42-35
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Last month, Bountiful handed Roy its only regular season loss of the year, 42-35. It was a repeat performance in the championship game Thursday at Rice-Eccles Stadium.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Bulls great Bob Love dead at 81 after battle with cancer
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — An all-star for the Chicago Bulls in the 1970's, franchise great Bob Love has died at the age of 81 after a long battle with cancer, the team announced Monday. Love played from 1968 to 1976 with the Chicago Bulls and was affectionately nicknamed "Butterbean" for his kind demeanor.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Utes hope to end six-game slide against Iowa State
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah football team will try to end its longest losing streak in 22 years when they take on #22 Iowa State Saturday in their home finale at Rice-Eccles Stadium.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: USD Men's Soccer to host UC Davis in NCAA Tournament
item.description: The Toreros are going to the big dance, though they don't necessarily like the song that's playing. The Toreros earned an automatic bid to the NCAA Tournament after they captured their third straight West Coast Conference Title on Saturday with their (1-0) win over Loyola Marymount.
item.dc:creator: Chase Izidoro, Fox 5

item.title: Column: Once Eberflus is gone, it's time to find a true culture setter
item.description: The Chicago Bears have lost three games in a row despite having a positive turnover margin, and need a head coach who can galvanize his roster to eat a punch early and rise to the occasion when the game is on the line.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Beyoncé performing at halftime of NFL Christmas Day game on Netflix
item.description: Beyoncé is coming to your home on Christmas — provided you have Netflix and are tuning in to the Baltimore Ravens-Houston Texans game.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Sengun records triple-double, VanVleet scores 28 in Rockets 143-107 rout of Bulls
item.description: Fred VanVleet scored a season-high 28 points, Alperen Sengun had 20 points, 11 rebounds and 11 assists for his second triple-double this season and the Houston Rockets routed the Chicago Bulls 143-107 on Sunday night for their fifth straight win.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: CMU drops final game at home against Western Colorado
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—After a six-game winning streak, Colorado Mesa University was dealt a setback by South Dakota Mines. Now, the Mavericks return to their home field with the stakes as high as the Rocky Mountains, aiming to secure a playoff spot.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Ewers' two touchdowns, Texas' defense lead No. 3 Longhorns past Arkansas 20-10
item.description: Quinn Ewers threw for 176 yards and two touchdowns and No. 3 Texas’ defense clamped down on Arkansas’ final two possessions to help the Longhorns win 20-10 on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: ERIC W. BOLIN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Roy High to play for first state title since 1981
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Roy High football team will play for its first state championship in 43 years. Roy defeated defending 5A champion Timpview on Friday, 29-19 to advance to next week's title game at Rice-Eccles Stadium.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
